title: k6 Enterprise Framework — Threshold Override Configuration Schema
description: Schema for client-specific threshold overrides stored in clients/{name}/config/thresholds.json

services.description: Service-level threshold overrides (service name -> metric name -> threshold conditions)

profiles.description: Profile-level threshold overrides (profile name -> metric name -> threshold conditions)

global.description: Global overrides applied to all services and profiles (metric name -> threshold conditions)
